• Be in need of skilled nursing care on an intermittent basis or physical therapy or

• Have a continuing need for occupational therapy. 

For purposes of benefit eligibility, under §§1814(a)(2)(C) and 1835(a)(2)(A) of the Act, 
"intermittent" means skilled nursing care that is either provided or needed on fewer than
